title: Itineraria und Periploi in der Antike
further_info: Recommended Reading ‘The anonymous Stadiasmus of the Great Sea’, translated by Brady Kiesling with Leif Isaksen (2014). Topos Texts. DOI: https://topostext.org/work.php?work_id=217.
